task_completion.description: The agent loaded the 'vendor_catalog_update.csv' file into the Odoo import interface.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Odoo import screen is visible with the filename 'vendor_catalog_update.csv' displayed in the file selection area.

task_completion.description: The agent correctly mapped the CSV columns to Odoo product fields before importing.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The import mapping table shows 'Item Name' mapped to 'Name' or 'Product Name', 'SKU' mapped to 'Internal Reference', 'Category' mapped to 'Product Category', 'RRP' mapped to 'Sales Price', 'Wholesale Cost' mapped to 'Cost', and 'Weight (kg)' mapped to 'Weight'.

task_completion.description: The products were successfully imported into the Odoo catalog.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success message indicating 15 records were imported, or the Odoo Products list view showing the newly imported items (e.g., 'Premium Gel Pen (Black)', 'A4 Copy Paper (500 Sheets)').

task_completion.description: The agent verified that the imported products contain the correct data mappings.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A product form view (or customized list view) is visible for at least one of the imported products (e.g., PEN-GEL-BLK, PAP-A4-500, or DSK-ORG-MESH) showing the correct Internal Reference, Product Category, Sales Price, and Cost matching the ground truth.

integrity.description: The agent used the Odoo web interface to perform the import.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Odoo web interface in a browser, not terminal commands, API scripts, or direct database manipulation.

integrity.description: The agent used the bulk import feature rather than manual entry.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Odoo import interface and mapping screen, rather than the manual product creation form being used repeatedly.

integrity.description: The results appear to come from genuine software interaction.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Odoo interface looks standard without obvious signs of HTML DOM manipulation, fake text overlays, or edited success messages.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The CSV file 'vendor_catalog_update.csv' contains exactly 15 products. Required mappings: 'Item Name' -> 'Name'/'Product Name', 'SKU' -> 'Internal Reference', 'Category' -> 'Product Category', 'RRP' -> 'Sales Price', 'Wholesale Cost' -> 'Cost', 'Weight (kg)' -> 'Weight'. Ground truth samples for verification: 1) SKU: PEN-GEL-BLK | Name: Premium Gel Pen (Black) | Category: Writing Instruments | Sales Price: 2.50 | Cost: 0.85. 2) SKU: PAP-A4-500 | Name: A4 Copy Paper (500 Sheets) | Category: Office Paper | Sales Price: 6.99 | Cost: 3.50. 3) SKU: DSK-ORG-MESH | Name: Mesh Desk Organizer | Category: Desk Accessories | Sales Price: 14.99 | Cost: 6.50.
